details: The agent successfully navigated to the Wikipedia 'World population' article, found the 'World population milestones in billions (Worldometers estimates)' table, and correctly extracted all 8 milestone years: 1B=1804, 2B=1927, 3B=1960, 4B=1974, 5B=1987, 6B=1999, 7B=2011, 8B=2022. All values match the known facts exactly.
